stemHtml: A straight line is drawn on an aeronautical chart and the true track between two positions at different latitudes on that line changes by 28°. What does this mean?

options.a: The Earth meridians at the two positions converge with an angle of 28°.
options.b: The Earth meridians at the two positions converge with an angle of 14°.
options.c: The chart meridians at the two positions converge with an angle of 28°.
options.d: The chart meridians at the two positions converge with an angle of 14°.
